channel.title: How to connect gzip or br text compression to frontity?
channel.description:
Hello frontity community Can you please describe the current ways to enable gzip or br text compression (I understand that this is often done using nginx, but I can’t run it with frontity - https://community.frontity.org/t/how-to-set-up-nginx-docker-frontity/6660)
I looked through most of the repositories in "Showcase" and did not find the ways through which you include this, although when I went directly to the sites I saw "content-encoding: gzip" or "content-encoding: br"

item.title: How to connect gzip or br text compression to frontity?
item.dc:creator: maksim.liakh.dev
item.description:
Hello frontity community
Can you please describe the current ways to enable gzip or br text compression (I understand that this is often done using nginx, but I can’t run it with frontity - How to set up nginx + docker + frontity?)

I looked through most of the repositories in “Showcase” and did not find the ways through which you include this, although when I went directly to the sites I saw “content-encoding: gzip” or “content-encoding: br”

Read full topic
item.source: How to connect gzip or br text compression to frontity?
